titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 156: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 156. (A.R. No. 40 of 1995-96.) TIRUVIŚALŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, bhiṭṭi, Bhikshāṇḍār shrine, Śivayōganāthasvāmi temple.

Records that an individual Puḻudiyūr uḍaiyāṉ Tiruviśalūr Sūryaṉ alias Edirmēṟ Śīkaṇḍappēraraiyan of Puḻudiyūr, a dēvadāna on the same northern bank of the river (Kāvēri) donated one hundred kalam of paddy to the god of Tiruviśalūr alias Śrī Avaṉiṉārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna-brahmadēya on the northern bank to meet the expenditure (of employing persons) for beating the drum etc., daily during the morning waking-up as well as of the bath ceremony of god Kūttapperumāḷ, who dances. But for reasons not known the uvachchars of the temple as headed by Vādyappēraraiyaṉ alias Nakkaṉ Sēndaṉ and Bhaṭṭaṉ Perumāṉ did not receive the paddy. Now it was decided by the sabhā that they would contribute the interest, fifty kalam of paddy accruing on the endowed one hundred kalam of paddy to the above stated two uvachchar for their engaging the several musicians to play the musical instruments during the ceremony.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivaṟmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu vaṭakarai tevatāṉabrahmadeyam śrīavaṉiṉārā(ā)yaṇac caturvetimaṅkalamāṉa tiruvicalūrp perumāḷukku Ikkarai
t tevatāṉam puḻutiyūr puḻutiyūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvicalūr suryyaṉākiya Etiṟmeṟ cikaṇṭapperaiyaṉ tiruvicalūr Āṭiyaru
ḷukiṉṟa kūttap perumāḷukkuc candrādittaval nicatamum paḷḷiyeḻucci koṭṭiṉavāṟe kūttapperumāḷāṭiyaruḷa Āṭṭattukku vācippataṟku vai poṉ p
poṟkālāl mutal ++ḷa Iṉṉellu ṉūṟṟuk kalamum śrīkoyil kāṇiyuṭaiya Uvaccakaḷ vādyapperaiyaṉāṉa nakkaṉ centaṉuke ṟp pe
ruvaccaṉāṉa paṭṭaṉ perumāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Uvaccakaḷoṅ koḷāmaiyil Iññellukku kkalattuvāy Āṭṭam viṭṭam � poṉ palicaiyākap polin=ta
Inta palicai ṉellu Aimpatiṉ kalattālum Āṭṭattukku koṭṭum pūkarakam peruvaṭakam �m karuṭikai �m mattaḷi 2m tāḷa
m vīṇaiyum caṅkiraṇṭu Āka Ivveṇṭu Āḷuṅkoṇṭu Ācandrādittava lāṭṭattukku vācippomāṉom Ivviruvomuḷḷiṭṭa Uvaccakaḷom Idharmmam mahāsabhaiyom panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
